---
format:
  revealjs:
    title: "Week 7 Lecture"
    subtitle: "Dr Shunya Kimura <br> skimura@liverpool.ac.uk"
    incremental: true
    slide-number: true
    slide-level: 3
    output-file: "w7-slides-lecture.html"
    theme: ../scss/custom.scss
    revealjs-plugins:
      - pointer
    echo: true
---

### Sports Analytics in Practice {.not-bold}

#### Foundations of Reproducible Analytics

![](../images/UoL%20Zoom%20Backgrounds_20226.jpg){.stretch fig-align="center"}

### Module Outline

```{=html}
<div style="width:100%; font-family:Poppins,sans-serif; font-size:0.82em; margin-top:2em;">

    <div style="display:flex; padding:0.35em 0; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; color:#222;">
      <span style="width:3.2em; font-weight:700; color:#EF426F;">W7</span>
      <span style="font-weight:600;">Foundations of Reproducible Analytics</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; padding:0.35em 0; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; color:#555;">
      <span style="width:3.2em; font-weight:600; color:#aaa;">W8</span>
      <span>API &amp; Data Sourcing</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; padding:0.35em 0; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; color:#555;">
      <span style="width:3.2em; font-weight:600; color:#aaa;">W9</span>
      <span>Interactive Dashboards with Shinylive I</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; padding:0.35em 0; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; color:#555;">
      <span style="width:3.2em; font-weight:600; color:#aaa;">W10</span>
      <span>Interactive Dashboards with Shinylive II</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; padding:0.35em 0; color:#555;">
      <span style="width:3.2em; font-weight:600; color:#aaa;">W11</span>
      <span>The Professional Portfolio</span>
    </div>

</div>
```

### This Week

-   TODO

## Section 1

### Slide Title

Content here

::: notes
Speaker notes here.
:::
